chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.58 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on C.M.A No.696/2026 (Restoration) 06.04.2026 None is present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. The same was the position on the last date of hearing, when the application for restoration was dismissed for non-prosecution. Accordingly, the listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
